underlying_goal: Fix CI lint issues on a SIA DC-03 parser PR, understand the code better through walkthrough and refactoring discussion, and wind down the session
friction_detail: The gofmt alignment fix was wrong (removed alignment instead of keeping it consistent), and the unit type boundary check fix broke existing tests because unit types contain uppercase letters.
brief_summary: User needed to fix CI lint failures and wanted to understand their parser code better; lint got partially fixed but a unit boundary fix had to be reverted, and the session turned into planning/emotional support.
